zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强但面临突破压力
zh.content:
当前XRP/美元维持小幅震荡上行结构，价格运行在1.14附近高位区间，多头略占优势但整体动能一般，市场仍处于整理蓄势阶段，尚未形成有效趋势性突破信号。

从均线结构看，价格持续站稳SMA20均线1.13409上方，短期趋势保持偏多排列。MACD维持微弱正值，说明多头动能仍在，但缺乏明显放量配合，行情偏震荡运行。

支撑位关注1.134附近均线支撑，其次为1.13525日内低点。上方阻力集中在1.14315前高区域，若有效突破则有望打开向1.15上方的短线空间，需观察成交量配合。

操作上建议以区间交易为主，高位不过分追多，回踩1.135-1.136区域可轻仓试多，若跌破1.134则需谨慎转为观望。短线交易注意快进快出控制风险。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is showing a mild bullish consolidation after a short recovery from the 1.135 area. Price action remains compressed near recent highs, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The market is attempting to sustain momentum above the short-term moving average, indicating improving sentiment. However, the lack of strong expansion implies traders are still cautious, awaiting a clearer breakout signal to confirm directional continuation upward.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously positive picture. MACD reading of 0.0007 suggests weak but constructive bullish momentum, though the absence of a confirmed signal line limits reliability. Price holding above the SMA(20) at 1.13409 reinforces a short-term supportive structure and a mild upward bias. With no RSI data available, momentum strength is harder to gauge, but stable trading near the upper bound of the daily range suggests controlled buying pressure rather than aggressive accumulation.

Key resistance is positioned at 1.14315, marking the immediate ceiling where recent price action has stalled. A clean breakout above this level could extend gains toward the psychological 1.1500 region. On the downside, initial support is located at 1.13525, closely aligned with recent lows, while stronger structural support sits near the SMA20 at 1.1340. A breakdown below this area would risk a deeper pullback toward 1.1300.

Trading conditions favor short-term range strategies until volatility expands. Long positions are better suited for confirmed closes above 1.14315 with volume support, targeting 1.1500 as the next upside objective. Alternatively, rejection at resistance may offer fade opportunities back toward support levels. Tight risk management is important given the compressed range, with stops placed just outside breakout or breakdown thresholds to avoid whipsaw movements.
